manual_entries.title: VAV Reheat Zone – Cooling SAT Reset Requests
manual_entries.summary: Generate cooling SAT reset requests based on zone temperature deviation: 3 requests if zone temp exceeds cooling setpoint by 3°C for 2 min; 2 requests if by 2°C for 2 min; 1 request if cooling loop >95% until <85%; 0 otherwise.

structured_payload.title: VAV Reheat Zone – Cooling SAT Reset Requests
structured_payload.summary: Generate cooling SAT reset requests based on zone temperature deviation: 3 requests if zone temp exceeds cooling setpoint by 3°C for 2 min; 2 requests if by 2°C for 2 min; 1 request if cooling loop >95% until <85%; 0 otherwise.
structured_payload.trigger_condition: Zone temperature exceeds cooling setpoint by 3°C (5°F) for 2 minutes (after suppression).
structured_payload.required_behavior: Send 3 requests. Else if by 2°C for 2 min, send 2 requests. Else if cooling loop >95%, send 1 request until <85%. Else send 0 requests.
structured_payload.evidence_quote: Cooling SAT Reset Requests a. If the zone temperature exceeds the zone’s cooling setpoint by 3°C (5°F) for 2 minutes and after suppression period due to setpoint change per Section 5.1.20, send 3 requests. b. Else if the zone temperature exceeds the zone’s cooling setpoint by 2°C (3°F) for 2 minutes and after suppression period due to setpoint change per Section 5.1.20, send 2 requests. c. Else if the Cooling Loop is greater than 95%, send 1 request until the Cooling Loop is less than 85%. d. Else if the Cooling Loop is less than 95%, send 0 requests.

manual_entries.title: VAV Reheat Zone – Cooling Sequence
manual_entries.summary: When Zone State is cooling, map cooling loop output to active airflow setpoint from cooling minimum to cooling maximum. If AHU SAT > room temperature, limit airflow setpoint to minimum endpoint. Heating coil is disabled unless DAT is below minimum setpoint.

structured_payload.title: VAV Reheat Zone – Cooling Sequence
structured_payload.equipment_scope: VAV terminal unit with reheat coil
structured_payload.summary: When Zone State is cooling, map cooling loop output to active airflow setpoint from cooling minimum to cooling maximum. If AHU SAT > room temperature, limit airflow setpoint to minimum endpoint. Heating coil is disabled unless DAT is below minimum setpoint.
structured_payload.trigger_condition: Zone State is cooling.
structured_payload.required_behavior: Map cooling loop output to airflow setpoint between cooling minimum and cooling maximum. If AHU SAT > room temp, cap at minimum. Disable heating coil unless DAT < minimum setpoint.
structured_payload.evidence_quote: When the Zone State is cooling, the cooling-loop output shall be mapped to the active airflow setpoint from the cooling minimum endpoint to the cooling maximum endpoint. Heating coil is disabled unless the DAT is below the minimum setpoint (see Section 5.6.5.4). a. If supply air temperature from the air handler is greater than room temperature, the active airflow setpoint shall be no higher than the minimum endpoint.

manual_entries.title: Multiple-Zone VAV AHU – Freeze Protection Stage 1
manual_entries.summary: If SAT drops below 4.4°C for 5 minutes, send two heating hot-water plant requests, override OA damper to minimum, and modulate heating coil to maintain SAT ≥ 6°C. Disable when SAT > 7°C for 5 minutes.

structured_payload.title: Multiple-Zone VAV AHU – Freeze Protection Stage 1
structured_payload.equipment_scope: Multiple-zone VAV AHU with heating coil
structured_payload.summary: If SAT drops below 4.4°C for 5 minutes, send two heating hot-water plant requests, override OA damper to minimum, and modulate heating coil to maintain SAT ≥ 6°C. Disable when SAT > 7°C for 5 minutes.
structured_payload.trigger_condition: SAT < 4.4°C (40°F) for 5 minutes.
structured_payload.required_behavior: Send two (or more) heating hot-water plant requests, override OA damper to minimum, modulate heating coil to maintain SAT ≥ 6°C (42°F). Disable when SAT > 7°C (45°F) for 5 minutes.
structured_payload.evidence_quote: If the supply air temperature drops below 4.4°C (40°F) for 5 minutes, send two (or more, as required to ensure that heating plant is active) heating hot-water plant requests, override the outdoor air damper to the minimum position, and modulate the heating coil to maintain a supply air temperature of at least 6°C (42°F). Disable this function when supply air temperature rises above 7°C (45°F) for 5 minutes.

manual_entries.title: Multiple-Zone VAV AHU – Freeze Protection Stage 2
manual_entries.summary: If SAT drops below 3.3°C for 5 minutes, fully close economizer and minimum OA dampers for 1 hour and set Level 3 alarm. After 1 hour, resume minimum OA and enter Stage 1.

structured_payload.title: Multiple-Zone VAV AHU – Freeze Protection Stage 2
structured_payload.summary: If SAT drops below 3.3°C for 5 minutes, fully close economizer and minimum OA dampers for 1 hour and set Level 3 alarm. After 1 hour, resume minimum OA and enter Stage 1.
structured_payload.trigger_condition: SAT < 3.3°C (38°F) for 5 minutes.
structured_payload.required_behavior: Fully close economizer and minimum OA dampers for 1 hour, set Level 3 alarm. After 1 hour, resume minimum OA and enter Stage 1 freeze protection.

manual_entries.title: Multiple-Zone VAV AHU – Freeze Protection Stage 3
manual_entries.summary: Upon freeze-stat signal, or if SAT < 3.3°C for 15 minutes or < 1°C for 5 minutes, shut down fans, close OA damper, open cooling coil valve to 100%, energize CHW pumps, send heating requests, modulate heating coil to maintain 27°C, and set Level 2 alarm. Requires manual reset.

structured_payload.title: Multiple-Zone VAV AHU – Freeze Protection Stage 3
structured_payload.summary: Upon freeze-stat signal, or if SAT < 3.3°C for 15 minutes or < 1°C for 5 minutes, shut down fans, close OA damper, open cooling coil valve to 100%, energize CHW pumps, send heating requests, modulate heating coil to maintain 27°C, and set Level 2 alarm. Requires manual reset.
structured_payload.trigger_condition: Freeze-stat signal OR SAT < 3.3°C (38°F) for 15 minutes OR SAT < 1°C (34°F) for 5 minutes.
structured_payload.required_behavior: Shut down supply and return/relief fans, close OA damper, open cooling coil valve to 100%, energize CHW pump system, send two heating hot-water plant requests, modulate heating coil to maintain 27°C (80°F), set Level 2 alarm. Requires software reset.
structured_payload.evidence_quote: Upon signal from the freeze-stat (if installed), or if supply air temperature drops below 3.3°C (38°F) for 15 minutes or below 1°C (34°F) for 5 minutes, shut down supply and return/relief fan(s), close outdoor air damper, open the cooling-coil valve to 100%, and energize the CHW pump system. Also send two (or more, as required to ensure that heating plant is active) heating hot-water plant requests, modulate the heating coil to maintain the higher of the supply air temperature or the mixed air temperature at 27°C (80°F), and set a Level 2 alarm indicating the unit is shut down by freeze protection.

chunk.cleaned_text:
If it is warm enough that the SAT rises above 7°C (45°F) with minimum ventilation , the unit
will remain in Stage 1 freeze protection for 5 minutes then resume normal operation.
If it is cold enough that SAT remains between 3.3°C (38°F) and 7°C (45°F) with heating and minimum ventilation,
the unit will remain in Stage 1 freeze protectio n indefinitely until outdoor conditions warm up.
If it is so cold that SAT is less than 3.3°F (38°F) with minimum ventilation, despite heating, then the unit will revert
to Stage 2 freeze protection where it will remain for 1 hour. This process will then r epeat.

structured_payload.title: Single-Zone VAV AHU – Freeze Protection Stage 1
structured_payload.equipment_scope: Single-zone VAV AHU with heating coil
structured_payload.summary: If SAT drops below 4°C for 5 minutes, send two heating hot-water plant requests, override OA damper to minimum, and modulate heating coil to maintain SAT ≥ 6°C. Disable when SAT > 7°C for 5 minutes.
structured_payload.trigger_condition: SAT < 4°C (40°F) for 5 minutes.
structured_payload.required_behavior: Send two (or more) heating hot-water plant requests, override OA damper to minimum, modulate heating coil to maintain SAT ≥ 6°C (42°F). Disable when SAT > 7°C (45°F) for 5 minutes.
structured_payload.evidence_quote: If the supply air temperature drops below 4°C (40°F) for 5 minutes, send two (or more, as required to ensure that heating plant is active) heating hot-water plant requests, override the outdoor air damper to the minimum position, and modulate the heating coil to maintain a supply air temperature of at least 6°C (42°F). Disable this function when supply air temperature rises above 7°C (45°F) for 5 minutes.

manual_entries.title: Single-Zone VAV AHU – Freeze Protection Stage 3
manual_entries.summary: Upon freeze-stat signal, or if SAT < 3°C for 15 minutes or < 1°C for 5 minutes, shut down fans, close OA damper, open cooling coil valve to 100%, energize CHW pumps, send heating requests, modulate heating coil to maintain 27°C, and set Level 2 alarm. Requires manual reset.

structured_payload.title: Single-Zone VAV AHU – Freeze Protection Stage 3
structured_payload.summary: Upon freeze-stat signal, or if SAT < 3°C for 15 minutes or < 1°C for 5 minutes, shut down fans, close OA damper, open cooling coil valve to 100%, energize CHW pumps, send heating requests, modulate heating coil to maintain 27°C, and set Level 2 alarm. Requires manual reset.
structured_payload.trigger_condition: Freeze-stat signal OR SAT < 3°C (38°F) for 15 minutes OR SAT < 1°C (34°F) for 5 minutes.
structured_payload.required_behavior: Shut down supply and return/relief fans, close OA damper, set cooling coil valve to 100%, energize CHW pump system, send two heating hot-water plant requests, modulate heating coil to maintain 27°C (80°F), set Level 2 alarm. Requires software reset.
structured_payload.evidence_quote: Upon signal from the freeze-stat (if installed), or if supply air temperature drops below 3°C (38°F) for 15 minutes or below 1°C (34°F) for 5 minutes, shut down supply and return/relief fan(s), close outdoor air damper, make the minimum cooling-coil valve position 100%, and energize the CHW pump system. Send two (or more, as required to ensure that heating plant is active) heating hot-water plant requests, modulate the heating coil to maintain the higher of the supply air temperature or the mixed air temperature at 27°C (80°F), and set a Level 2 alarm indicating the unit is shut down by freeze protection.

structured_payload.trigger_condition: Zone State is cooling and unit has a cooling coil.
structured_payload.required_behavior: Reset fan speed and SATsp per control diagram. Modulate cooling coil to maintain SATsp. Heating coil OFF.
structured_payload.evidence_quote: If there is a cooling coil, when Zone State is Cooling 1. For a cooling-loop signal of 0% to 50%, FANsp is MinCoolSpeed. 2. For a cooling-loop signal of 50% to 100%, FANsp is reset from MinCoolSpeed to MaxCoolSpeed. 3. For a cooling-loop signal of 0% to 50%, SATsp is reset from the active zone cooling setpoint to Cool_SAT. 4. For a cooling-loop signal of 50% to 100%, SATsp is Cool_SAT. 5. The cooling coil shall be modulated with a PID loop to maintain the discharge temperature at SATsp. 6. Heating coil OFF

manual_entries.title: FCU – FC#2: SAT Too Low in Full Heating
manual_entries.summary: Fault condition: SAT AVG < SATSP - ƐSAT and HC ≥ 99%. Possible causes: SAT sensor error, cooling coil valve leaking, heating coil valve stuck closed, fouled coil, HW temperature too low, gas/electric heat unavailable, DX cooling stuck on.
